title: Beehiiv vs Brevo (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Compare Beehiiv and Brevo email marketing tools. See pricing, features, and which fits your needs best.
intro: Beehiiv and Brevo are both popular email marketing platforms, but they serve different audiences with distinct strengths. Beehiiv focuses on newsletter creators seeking monetization and growth tools, while Brevo offers a broader CRM suite with multi-channel capabilities. Understanding their differences will help you choose the right platform for your business.

comparison_table.tool_a: Ad network, referral program, web reader, analytics
comparison_table.tool_b: SMS, WhatsApp, live chat, CRM, transactional API

choose_a_if: You're a newsletter creator looking to monetize your audience through ads and sponsorships
You want built-in analytics and engagement tracking tailored to publisher growth
You prefer a platform specifically optimized for newsletter distribution and reader experience
choose_b_if: You need SMS, WhatsApp, or live chat alongside email marketing
You require a comprehensive CRM system with transactional email API capabilities
You want the largest free tier (100,000 subscribers) to scale without immediate costs

faq.a: Neither is universally better—it depends on your needs. Beehiiv excels for newsletter publishers seeking monetization tools, while Brevo is superior for businesses needing multi-channel marketing and CRM capabilities. Beehiiv has slightly higher G2 and Trustpilot ratings, but Brevo offers more versatility for diverse marketing scenarios.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, Beehiiv or Brevo?
faq.a: Brevo starts at $25/month compared to Beehiiv's $39/month, making it more affordable for paid plans. However, Brevo's free tier allows 100,000 subscribers versus Beehiiv's 2,500, making Brevo substantially more generous for users staying on the free plan.

faq.q: Can I switch from Brevo to Beehiiv?
faq.a: Yes, both platforms support email list imports through CSV files or API connections. Migration is typically straightforward, though you'll lose multi-channel features like SMS and WhatsApp if switching from Brevo. Plan your transition carefully to preserve subscriber data and campaign history.
